title: Fever and productive cough — general clinic

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: What's been going on this week?

chunks.speaker: patient
chunks.text: I've had a fever for three days and a cough that brings up phlegm.

chunks.speaker: patient
chunks.text: I feel a lot of fatigue as well, hard to get through the day.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: Temperature today is 38.1, respiratory rate 18, saturation 97 percent.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: Throat is mildly red, chest is clear on examination.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: Rest, fluids, paracetamol as needed, and a chest x-ray if it goes past five days.
